weights_definition: Queen contiguity among monitored counties only; row-standardized shared-boundary weights. This preserves the legacy specification but fragments when monitored counties do not touch.
Directed K-nearest-neighbor weights using county representative points in EPSG:3071; k=3; row-standardized; asymmetric neighbor lists; not symmetrized.
Directed K-nearest-neighbor weights using county representative points in EPSG:3071; k=4; row-standardized; asymmetric neighbor lists; not symmetrized.
Directed K-nearest-neighbor weights using county representative points in EPSG:3071; k=5; row-standardized; asymmetric neighbor lists; not symmetrized.
